notes:
**Joint release with keen-backend 0.19.0** — the largest collaboration milestone to date, plus reliability fixes and backend improvements accumulated since 0.18.2.

## Federated Collaboration

This release delivers the full **ghost-as-native-row** convergence (R0–R3): shared work from another Keen instance now appears as **real tasks and projects in your lists**, not a separate projection layer.

### Subscribe to a shared project (Phase 2)
- **Settings → Shared Projects → Add** — connect to a remote Leader with host, project ID, and invite token.
- Tokens are stored per-subscription in the macOS Keychain; live sync runs app-wide (not only while Settings is open).
- Connection status badge updates in real time (Connecting / Active / Disconnected / Revoked).

### See and work with shared items (R3)
- Subscribed tasks and projects appear in your primary **Tasks** and **Projects** lists with a **Shared from** badge.
- Permission tiers gate what you can edit: read-only, status-only, or fuller edits — enforced in the UI and on the backend.
- Descriptions and notes are **fetched live from the Leader** when you open a shared item (never stored locally).
- Drill-down on a shared project or milestone shows its subscribed children.
- The legacy `ghost_entities` table and GraphQL surface are retired; sync now writes native rows marked by federation pointer columns.

### Leader API (Phase 1 — backend)
- Project owners on Managed or Self-host can create invite tokens with tiered permissions (`read_only`, `edit_status`, `edit_full`).
- Subscribers get a scoped GraphQL/WS API and live `sharedProjectEvents` — no access to the rest of the Leader's instance.

## Reliability & onboarding

- **Apple Silicon fresh installs** no longer hang on "Starting up…" when PostgreSQL binaries aren't bundled — the app proceeds to download them on first launch.
- **Startup failures** now show a clear error and a working **Try again** button instead of an infinite spinner.
- **Onboarding "About You"** no longer traps you if saving your name fails — you can skip and continue, with inline retry.

## Tasks

- **Subtask project/milestone** is read-only in the UI — subtasks inherit their root task's project and milestone (backend-enforced invariant since migration 053).
- Federated subtasks and linked entities correctly show shared badges and respect edit gating.

## Backend (Managed hosting & local server 0.19.0)

- **Belief retrieval** re-ranks search results by lifecycle (`active` / `fading` / `corrected`), confidence, and recency — stale beliefs no longer dominate purely on vector distance.
- **Workflow data sources** can filter chat sessions and knowledge items by `updated_at` (fixes Daily Summary missing recently-edited items).
- **Daily Summary synthesis** strips model planning preamble before saving; prompt formatting fixes for checklists.
- **Subtask inheritance** enforced at write time; migration 053 backfills existing rows.
- **GraphQL scope gate** enforced in all environments (required for federation subscriber tokens).
- Federation schema migrations **054–058** (shared projects, subscriber tables, native-row columns, ghost_entities drop).

## Install

| Platform | Artifact |
|---|---|
| Apple Silicon | `Keen_0.19.0_aarch64.dmg` |
| Intel Mac | `Keen_0.19.0_x64.dmg` |

Existing installs: **Keen → Check for Updates** or Settings → Updates.
